title: Create: Extended train deco
description: A mod that adds decoration from Trenitalia and SBB and train interior decoration
body: ![Train interior decor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390dc0d305d3e2aed6da5dddf6694098cc73dca3.png)Welcome to Create:Extended train deco! This mod adds logos and liveries from rail companies such as trenitalia (Italian state railways) and SBB, this mod adds also a train table. We're planning to add more liveries for other companies such as DB and others, also railside decoration for creating railways. If you discover bugs or you want to make a suggestion for the mod you can do it in our discord server!
